original_query: select l_shipmode, sum(case when o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' or o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' then 1 else 0 end) as high_line_count, sum(case when o_orderpriority <> '1-URGENT' and o_orderpriority <> '2-HIGH' then 1 else 0 end) as low_line_count from orders, lineitem where o_orderkey = l_orderkey and l_shipmode in ('REG AIR', 'AIR') and l_commitdate < l_receiptdate and l_shipdate < l_commitdate and l_receiptdate >= date '1995-01-01' and l_receiptdate < date '1995-01-01' + interval '1' year group by l_shipmode order by l_shipmode;
rewritten_query:
WITH filtered_lineitem AS (
    SELECT 
        l_orderkey,
        l_shipmode
    FROM 
        lineitem
    WHERE 
        l_shipmode IN ('REG AIR', 'AIR')
        AND l_commitdate < l_receiptdate
        AND l_shipdate < l_commitdate
        AND l_receiptdate >= DATE '1995-01-01'
        AND l_receiptdate < DATE '1995-01-01' + INTERVAL '1' YEAR
)
SELECT 
    l.l_shipmode,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE o.o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT', '2-HIGH')) AS high_line_count,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE o.o_orderpriority NOT IN ('1-URGENT', '2-HIGH')) AS low_line_count
FROM 
    filtered_lineitem l
JOIN 
    orders o ON l.l_orderkey = o.o_orderkey
GROUP BY 
    l.l_shipmode
ORDER BY 
    l.l_shipmode;

original_query: select l_shipmode, sum(case when o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' or o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' then 1 else 0 end) as high_line_count, sum(case when o_orderpriority <> '1-URGENT' and o_orderpriority <> '2-HIGH' then 1 else 0 end) as low_line_count from orders, lineitem where o_orderkey = l_orderkey and l_shipmode in ('TRUCK', 'SHIP') and l_commitdate < l_receiptdate and l_shipdate < l_commitdate and l_receiptdate >= date '1993-01-01' and l_receiptdate < date '1993-01-01' + interval '1' year group by l_shipmode order by l_shipmode;
rewritten_query: select l_shipmode, sum(case when o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' or o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' then 1 else 0 end) as high_line_count, sum(case when o_orderpriority <> '1-URGENT' and o_orderpriority <> '2-HIGH' then 1 else 0 end) as low_line_count from orders, lineitem where o_orderkey = l_orderkey and l_shipmode in ('TRUCK', 'SHIP') and l_commitdate < l_receiptdate and l_shipdate < l_commitdate and l_receiptdate >= date '1993-01-01' and l_receiptdate < date '1993-01-01' + interval '1' year group by l_shipmode order by l_shipmode;

original_query: select l_shipmode, sum(case when o_orderpriority = '1-URGENT' or o_orderpriority = '2-HIGH' then 1 else 0 end) as high_line_count, sum(case when o_orderpriority <> '1-URGENT' and o_orderpriority <> '2-HIGH' then 1 else 0 end) as low_line_count from orders, lineitem where o_orderkey = l_orderkey and l_shipmode in ('REG AIR', 'FOB') and l_commitdate < l_receiptdate and l_shipdate < l_commitdate and l_receiptdate >= date '1997-01-01' and l_receiptdate < date '1997-01-01' + interval '1' year group by l_shipmode order by l_shipmode;
rewritten_query:
SELECT 
    l_shipmode,
    SUM(CASE WHEN o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT', '2-HIGH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS high_line_count,
    COUNT(*) - SUM(CASE WHEN o_orderpriority IN ('1-URGENT', '2-HIGH') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS low_line_count
FROM 
    orders o
    INNER JOIN lineitem l ON o.o_orderkey = l.l_orderkey
WHERE 
    l.l_shipmode IN ('REG AIR', 'FOB')
    AND l.l_commitdate < l.l_receiptdate
    AND l.l_shipdate < l.l_commitdate
    AND l.l_receiptdate >= DATE '1997-01-01'
    AND l.l_receiptdate < DATE '1998-01-01'
GROUP BY 
    l_shipmode
ORDER BY 
    l_shipmode;
